name: Update Results Fast

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '15 4,16 * * *'    # 2×/jour (04h15 et 16h15 UTC), décalé des autres workflows
  workflow_dispatch:

# Permissions explicites pour autoriser le push (évite l'erreur 403)
permissions:
  contents: write

# Évite que deux exécutions se chevauchent
concurrency:
  group: backtest-write
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  fast:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Run fast results
        env:
          RAPIDAPI_KEY: ${{ secrets.RAPIDAPI_KEY }}
        run: python scripts/fetch_results_fast.py

      - name: Commit and push
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add backtest_tennis.csv
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "🎾 Résultats rapides (API) $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)"
          git push
